titleStmt.title: SII 7.245: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 245. (A.R. No. 69 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE LEFT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE HIRE-NEMISVARA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
At the top is engraved in relief the figure of a seated his head, flanked on the proper left by two chauris, a lamp-stand, the sun and a smaller lamp-stand, and on the proper left by two chauris, a lamp-stand, and a cow with calf.viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada bhādrapadabahuḷa daśa
miyu guruvāradallū śrīmatu Arirāyagaṁ
ḍara dāvaṇi śrīvīra bhairarasavoḍēra kumāra bhai
rarasavoḍēru kōlabiḷi Ayidusāvirāḷigu
malaha Ayidusāvirāḷigu pālasta kaṭṭina nirū
pada kramaveṁtaṁdare . kāvaheggaḍege koṭṭa naṁbige
manuśyadōśadiṁda kāvaheggaḍeyu monivogalāgi
kōlabaḷi Ayidusāvirāḷu bītiyastadāgi tolagalāgi
paṭṭadagurugaḷu caUṭaru Ajilaru nāḍubaḷi Ayidusā
virāḷu dēsiṁgarasaru śiśiladarasaru halaru māḍida madhyasta
da vivara naṁma saṁtānapāraṁpareyāgi keravaseya siṁhvāsa
nadalli bāḷibirāṇavallade salladeṁḍu hēḷasalladu . kōlabi
ḷi AiThis letter is denoted by A with the mark Ai given below it as to consonants.dusāvirāḷaṁnu pū¨rvakaṭṭaḷe pū¨rvama¨ryyādeyalli pāli
sikoḷāṇa . pū¨rvakaṭaḷe pū¨rvama¨ryyādege kōlabaḷiyadavaru
tappidare vittāpāravanu tekkoṁḍu rājyadiṁda horaḍisāṇa . A
rasugaḷiṁda tapuvāga voḍeya baṁṭaralla muṁda
kye manuśyatanava nōḍuvavaru drōhava māḍidare kaṁṇa
tege salladu . baḷi heṁmakkaḷige sī(¨r)re saṁkate salladu .
śrī nagadi koḍuvāga nūrukke kāṇikke mū(¨r)ru hoṁnina lke
dalli koḍāṇa . hadinā(¨r)ru maṁdiya A[¨rca]ke pū¨rvvakaṭṭaḷe
pū¨rvama¨ryyāde nīU salsi brā(ṁ)hmara hoyidu kollasalladu .
yidakke kaṭṭuvāga nāḍubaḷi Ai dusāvirāḷu kōlabaḷi AiHere the vowel Ai is written in a peculiar way with the addition of e and ai signs to the vowel A.
dusāvirāḷu voṁdē buddhiyeṁdu nēmīśvaragumaṭanā
tha siṁhvāsana sākṣi [.]
Digital edition of SII 7.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
